text: Juliet, the integration tests are passing. We have end-to-end routing and translation working.
That is incredible. But I have bad news. Tybalt pitched a competing proposal to our board this morning.
He wants Capulet Industries to build their own mesh routing from scratch. It would take months.
That is exactly what we are trying to prevent. The whole point of Verona Platform is avoiding duplicate effort.
I know. Nurse Angela is helping me block out calendar time so Tybalt cannot schedule over our syncs.
Good. We need to show the board a working demo before Tybalt gets funding for his version.
The schema bridge layer is performing well. Sub-millisecond translations on the test dataset.
That is the number we need for the investor demo. Prince Escalus will want to see real performance data.
Rosaline mentioned he is particularly interested in the unified gateway angle.
Perfect. I will prep the staging environment tonight. Can you send me the latest schema mappings?
Already pushed to the shared repo. Be careful with the commit timestamps this time.
Right. Benvolio almost caught on this morning. I need to be more careful about the digital trail.
